page_content:
Formerly: EDCP789D.

EDCP695 Ethical and Professional Issues in Counseling Psychology (3 Credits)

Exploration of ethical and professional issues in Counseling Psychology. Prerequisite: Must be in the Counseling Psychology program. Also offered as: PSYC695.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP669, EDCP688, EDCP695, PSYC688, or PSYC695.
